Uses of Package
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model

  • Packages that use de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.smt
    This package contains the graphical user interface of the SMT backend.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.smt
    This package contains the SMT backend of KeY, allowing to translate KeY formulas to formulas in formats such as SMT-LIB, and allowing to send such formulas to SMT solvers such as Simplify or Z3.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen  
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.smt 
    Class and Description
    LocationSet
    A LocationSet represents a location set in an SMT model.
    Model
    Represents an SMT model.
    ObjectVal
    Represents an object inside a heap.
    Sequence
    Represents a sequence in an SMT model.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model used by de.uka.ilkd.key.smt 
    Class and Description
    Model
    Represents an SMT model.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model used by de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model 
    Class and Description
    Heap
    Represents a heap in the SMT model.
    Location
    A Location is a pair (objectID, fieldID)
    LocationSet
    A LocationSet represents a location set in an SMT model.
    ObjectVal
    Represents an object inside a heap.
    Sequence
    Represents a sequence in an SMT model.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model used by de.uka.ilkd.key.testgen 
    Class and Description
    Model
    Represents an SMT model.
